name: mpsuesser-pi-compound
description: Turn your past Pi sessions into system-prompt context docs. A two-stage LLM pipeline extracts durable preferences from session transcripts; you approve or reject from a TUI; approved items are appended to plain-markdown docs that ship verbatim to your system prompt.
